harnessScenarios.label: Patient request buffered preserve
harnessScenarios.description: Buffered updates keep focus on the active request action while the shell records local acknowledgement, pending queue truth, and final settlement.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: The request queue summary remains authoritative while status moves from local acknowledgement to settled confirmation.

harnessScenarios.label: Workspace selected-anchor restore
harnessScenarios.description: Selected-anchor preserve keeps the clinician on the chosen task summary through fold, unfold, and return without shell chrome narration.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: The workspace keeps the selected task stable while mission-stack fold and unfold happen inside one shell.

harnessScenarios.label: Patient messages thread restore
harnessScenarios.description: Thread restore keeps focus on the active conversation tab and deduplicates repeated pending announcements on the same causal tuple.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: The active thread stays selected and repeated pending narration is deduplicated on its causal tuple.

harnessScenarios.label: Operations chart parity downgrade
harnessScenarios.description: The matrix surface visibly downgrades from visual-plus-table parity to table-only when chart meaning becomes stale.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: Guardrail severity remains readable even if the chart view is withdrawn and the table becomes the authoritative surface.

harnessScenarios.label: Governance recovery invalidation
harnessScenarios.description: Recovery posture moves focus only when the contract requires invalidation, then returns to the summary rail with authoritative settlement language.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: Recovery moves focus to the stub only on contracted invalidation, then returns to the summary rail once settlement is authoritative.

harnessScenarios.label: Support blocked recovery
harnessScenarios.description: Blocked recovery keeps the same shell visible, suppresses repeated chrome narration, and falls back to summary-only evidence if visualization parity cannot be proved.
harnessScenarios.summarySentence: Replay evidence stays inspectable even when the chart is removed and the shell speaks only the blocked recovery truth.

prerequisite_gaps.statement: par_110 shared loading, empty, stale, blocked, and recovery posture deliverables were not present when par_111 executed.
prerequisite_gaps.safeFallback: The harness publishes its own bounded posture descriptors and fails closed to summary, table, or recovery stub markers until the shared posture surface lands.

gap_resolutions.statement: Operations and support matrix flows still need route-level evidence for the full roving-grid contract, so the shared harness marks them provisional instead of inventing exactness.
gap_resolutions.implementedRule: Grid routes publish the shared key model and remain visible, but verification state stays provisional and parity may downgrade to table-first proof.

gap_resolutions.statement: Tabs that also own thread restore need a stricter shared restore law than the blueprint spells out in copy-only terms.
gap_resolutions.implementedRule: Tab routes publish restore and activation keys now, but remain provisional until later route tracks attach live thread and governance evidence.

gap_resolutions.statement: Recovery wording is under-specified for embedded and replay cases, so the harness preserves authority class and suppresses decorative shell narration.
gap_resolutions.implementedRule: Announcement truth distinguishes local acknowledgement, pending, stale, recovery, and authoritative settlement first; copy stays calm and bounded.

gap_resolutions.statement: Operations chart surfaces cannot claim meaning beyond the fallback table and summary while matrix parity is still provisional.
gap_resolutions.implementedRule: When visual meaning is stale, the harness downgrades to table-only inside the same shell and records the downgrade as an explicit parity state.

gap_resolutions.statement: Support replay visuals may not always have a stable fallback table during blocked recovery.
gap_resolutions.implementedRule: When neither visual nor table can prove the tuple, the shell retreats to summary-only posture rather than inventing a pseudo-chart.

follow_on_dependencies.statement: Rebind the harness posture labels and examples to the shared par_110 surface once the canonical empty, stale, blocked, and recovery frames publish.
follow_on_dependencies.safeFallback: Current harness posture descriptors remain bounded and fail closed without changing focus or announcement law.

follow_on_dependencies.statement: Attach live route guards, runtime bindings, automation vocabulary, and patient-shell seed routes to the shared harness scenarios.
follow_on_dependencies.safeFallback: The route family matrices, scenario pack, and browser checks stay stable and can be consumed directly by later route tasks.
